content.en:
Soon after, the Lord of the Dragon and Serpent had successfully refined the Sword of Shadow and the Light Shuttle, and then crossed through a secret passage between the Extreme Deep Sea and the End of the Realm to the End of the Realm.

"The end of the world, here it is again, the environment here is really uncomfortable for the Extreme Dao creatures!"

The eyes of the Lord of the Dragon and Serpent showed a hint of unhappiness.

There is no extreme power at the end of the realm, the energy here is too low-end, except for the area far beyond the extreme path deep overseas, it is simply useless.

It was difficult for him to understand why such a low-end heaven and earth would give birth to so many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, if it weren't for those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea would have already destroyed the end of the realm.

"Sooner or later, the end of the realm will once again be under the control of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and all living beings in the end of the realm should become servants of the Extreme Dao creatures!" said the Lord of the Dragon and Snake.

After entering the end of the realm, the Lord of the Dragon and Snake retracted his breath and transformed into a cultivator.

With his realm, changing to become a cultivator, even if he is a perfect controller of the true realm, it is not easy to see through.

And the end of the realm is too big, and it is almost impossible to meet a perfect controller of the extreme realm here at will.

Therefore, as long as he didn't take the initiative to find the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm, he would hardly be discovered.

"It is said that some of the ancient Extreme Realm Perfect Masters of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea are hidden in the Realm Rim, and even completely integrated into the Realm Realm, living in the way of cultivators, and there is a tendency to take refuge in the Realm Realm. It's a pity, if they could do their best to help the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, I'm afraid they would have won the end of the realm long ago!"

The Lord of the Dragon and Serpent thought again.

Swish!

Time and space warped, and the body of the Lord of the Dragon and Serpent quickly shuttled through the deep time and space, heading to the Ruins of Eternity.

He has maps of many eternal worlds at the end of the world, so it is not difficult to find the ruins of eternity.

However, after approaching the ruins of eternity, he was careful not to show his breath.

He didn't even dare to use any means to probe the location of Ye Tian's body, otherwise it would be easy to be discovered by several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Daoless Tower.

Although the few Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Wudao Tower were not very powerful, once they were discovered, then his attack and killing plan would be tantamount to failure.

Before coming, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace had all helped him plan, first controlling a Ten Realm-level Masters who was about to join the Daoless Tower, so that he could blend into the Daoless Tower.

Otherwise, attacking Ye Tian outside the Daoless Tower, with the countless magic circle defenses of the Wudao Tower, the attack power would be very weak, and there would be a risk of being intercepted.

But once he entered the headquarters of the Daoless Tower, if he made another move, Ye Tian, who was at the level of a perfect controller of the Void Realm, couldn't stop it at all.

After the attack was successful, he could break the magic circle of the Pathless Tower and leave, with the Extreme Dao Alien Treasure Light Shuttle as an escape, and the several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Pathless Tower couldn't intercept him at all.

That's all there is to it!

......

"I've finally succeeded in joining the Pathless Tower!"

The rulers of the long river were very excited.

He is an unknown cultivator in the Ruins of Eternity, with a high talent, and he has always looked down on other small forces, so he has been silently cultivating for countless years, just to join the Daoless Pagoda.

Now, after passing the assessment, he is lucky to join the Wudao Tower.

Once he becomes a member of the Daoless Tower, there must be a 100% chance that he will become a half-step perfect controller in the future, and there is even hope that he will become a great perfect controller.

However, at this moment, a terrifying will descended.

The master of the long river did not resist, although his body was a clone of the will, but the moment this will came, even his body hidden somewhere in the ruins of eternity froze.

Soon, the master of the long river was controlled, and the person who controlled him was naturally the lord of the dragon and snake.

"It's very easy, there won't be any risk in controlling such a Ten Realm-level master. If you control a cultivator who has already joined the Daoless Pagoda and whose main body is at the headquarters of the Daoless Pagoda, it will be easy to be exposed. "

The Lord of Dragons and Serpents said secretly.

At this moment, he manipulated the master of the long river, and found an opportunity for himself to hide in the master of the long river.

Soon after, he followed the Master of the Long River and entered the Daoless Tower under the leadership of a perfect master.

And the whole time, the perfect controller didn't notice anything.

Daoist Tower Headquarters.

The Master of the River entered the area, was divided into a sub-tower, and took up residence here.

The Lord of the Dragon and Snake did not make a move immediately, but asked the master of the Long River to probe and determine the branch tower where Ye Tian was located.

"It's almost, it's time to do it!"

The Lord of the Dragon and Serpent stepped out of the body of the master of the Long River.

In an instant, he urged the Shadow Sword and slashed towards the branch tower where Ye Tian was.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller's burst instantly enveloped the entire Daoless Pagoda Headquarters, causing countless cultivators to shiver.

"Oh no! The Pathless Tower has been invaded!"

One by one, the perfect controllers realized this.

The Lord of the Daoless, the Lord of the Ancients, the Lord of the Eternal Night, and the Lord of the Sword Pole all sensed the aura of the Lord of the Dragon and Snake, but reacted one step slower, allowing the Lord of the Dragon and Snake to slash out the sword.

......

"Not good!"

Ye Tian felt the attack of the Shadow Sword, which was suppressed far beyond his own strength, he couldn't move, and the extreme power in his body was suppressed so much that he couldn't exert it.

Any escape technique is useless, and the defenses of the Daoless Tower are of no value.

At this moment, he only saw a black sword light that stabbed into his body in defiance of all defenses.

In an instant, the replica body was killed.

The Lord of the Dragon and Snake bombarded Ye Tian's duplicate body, and the sword light penetrated time and space, sensing Ye Tian's other will clone, crossing infinite time and space, and bombarding this will clone.

But at this time, the Lord of the Dragon and Snake was confused.

Although he did not comprehend the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect, he had comprehended the rudiments of the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect, coupled with his very high realm, and he had mastered the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, so he was able to perceive Ye Tian's other clones with the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect.

Under normal circumstances, a cultivator at the end of the realm would only have one clone, but now he sensed more than one clone, as if there was a slight connection in a distant place.

Under this sword, he slashed Ye Tian's two bodies, and his strength was no longer enough to kill the third body.

Somewhere at the end of the world.

Ye Tian's will clone has been looking for the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, and at this moment, he has also endured the edge of this sword.

Poof!

The clone of the will was hit hard and was almost killed.

And at this point, the power of the sword of the Lord of the Dragon and Snake was exhausted.

"Lord of Dragons and Serpents, you are looking for death!!!"

The Lord of the Senseless roared angrily.

In an instant, several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers made a move against the Lord of the Dragon and Snake.

"Let's go!"

The Lord of the Dragon and Snake couldn't care about Ye Tian's strange situation, he had to flee now, otherwise once he was trapped and attracted a strong person like the Lord of the White Night, he wouldn't be able to leave.

Immediately.

The Lord of the Dragon and Snake urged the light shuttle, turned into a ray of light, tore through the magic circle of the Daoless Tower, and quickly escaped.

The Lord of the Void chased after them, but left a Perfection Controller of the Extreme Realm to guard the Pathless Tower, preventing the Extreme Perfect Controller from attacking the Tower.

Meanwhile.

The Daoless Tower also sent a message to the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, informing them that the Lord of the Dragon and Serpent had infiltrated the Realm.

Suddenly, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller of the End of the Realm was furious.

The perfect controller of the extreme realm of the extreme deep sea still dares to sneak into the end of the realm to kill people, and he simply does not take the end of the realm in his eyes.

Extreme True River.

The Lord of the White Night also knew the news and immediately rushed over.

His speed is known as the best in the world, so he went straight out.

If you can kill a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller of the Extreme Deep Sea, then you will make a lot of money!
